Title: Interview Readiness Check
Description: Assess how prepared you are for each stage of the interview process and identify where to focus your practice.
SchemaJson: {"id":"interview_readiness_v1","title":"Interview Readiness Check","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"rating","label":"How confident do you feel walking into an interview right now?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"choice","label":"Which interview stage do you find most challenging?","options":["Phone or video screening","Competency-based questions","Technical or skills tests","Panel interviews","Final-round or executive interviews"],"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"rating","label":"How well-prepared are you with STAR-format stories for common questions?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"choice","label":"How do you currently prepare for interviews?","options":["Research the company and role thoroughly","Practise out loud with someone","Review job description only","I wing it","I have not had interviews recently"],"required":true},{"id":"q5","type":"text","label":"What would make the biggest difference to your interview performance?","required":false}]}
